question_text: What is your favorite TV show of all time?
How many hours per week do you spend watching TV shows?
What genres of TV shows do you typically enjoy?
Is there a particular actor or actress who consistently draws you to watch a TV show? If so, who?
On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is the streaming platform when choosing a TV show to watch?
Have you ever recommended a TV show to someone? If so, what show was it and why?
Do you prefer to binge-watch a TV show or watch one episode per week?
How often do you watch TV shows with others?
What aspects of a TV show are most important to you?
How satisfied are you with the variety of TV shows available today?
